hypothesis: Augmenting the single-agent preprocessing pipeline with an automated molecular-image localization and segmentation module trained on ChemX image annotations and coupled to a state-of-the-art OCSR tool (e.g., DECIMER) will increase SMILES extraction recall on small-molecule ChemX datasets from ≤0.04 to ≥0.60 and raise the overall extraction F1 for those datasets by at least 0.30.
